Icici Lombard achi company hai , claim process bhi sahi hai. Online tabhi lena jab aap apna claim khud handle kar pao. Means insurance ko agar aap ache se samjhte hon.
Claim dene ka time depend karta hai ki kis type ka claim hai, koi doubts ya investigation pending to nahi hain. Documents submit hone k baad  standard time 7-21 days k andar payment ka average time hota hai.
